errors.name: PoolFull
errors.msg: Pool is full

errors.name: CommitmentNotFound
errors.msg: Commitment not found in pool

errors.name: InvalidNullifierHash
errors.msg: Invalid nullifier hash

errors.name: AlreadyWithdrawn
errors.msg: This nullifier has already been used (double-spend attempt)

errors.name: InsufficientFunds
errors.msg: Insufficient funds in vault

errors.name: InvalidProof
errors.msg: Invalid ZK proof

errors.name: InvalidRoot
errors.msg: Root not found in history

errors.name: PoseidonError
errors.msg: Poseidon hash computation failed

errors.name: FeeTooHigh
errors.msg: Relayer fee must be less than the pool denomination

errors.name: InvalidTreeDepth
errors.msg: tree_depth must be 10 or 20

errors.name: InvalidPoolAsset
errors.msg: This instruction does not match the pool's asset type

errors.name: InvalidTokenMint
errors.msg: The provided SPL token mint does not match the pool

errors.name: UnsupportedNullifierVersion
errors.msg: This pool uses an unsupported nullifier storage version

errors.name: InvalidTokenOwner
errors.msg: The provided token account owner does not match the expected authority

errors.name: InvalidVaultAuthority
errors.msg: The SPL vault authority must be the vault PDA itself

errors.name: LegacyNullifierVersion
errors.msg: Legacy nullifier vector mode is deprecated

errors.name: InvalidCommitmentPage
errors.msg: The provided commitment page does not match the next deposit slot

errors.name: InvalidDepositAmount
errors.msg: deposit_amount must be greater than zero and within the supported client range

errors.name: InvalidCommitment
errors.msg: Commitment cannot be all zeros

errors.name: ZeroNullifierNote
errors.msg: Notes with nullifier = 0 are not allowed

errors.name: ProtocolFeeBpsTooHigh
errors.msg: protocol_fee_bps must be less than or equal to 500

errors.name: InvalidTreasury
errors.msg: The provided treasury account does not match the pool

errors.name: CombinedFeeTooHigh
errors.msg: Protocol fee plus relayer fee must be less than the pool denomination

errors.name: FeeMathOverflow
errors.msg: Fee calculation overflowed
